textByHash.6a5602840a03406215d4e10b440b22e6cef4b98b: I can't belive Xilo hasn't shown up.
textByHash.fd0e19d12d8838b65d81d2e22704f8fd14b8f893: My... friend, Xilo. I told her to meet me by the magic trees of the rainforest. We don't often have a chance to meet without a crowd of people around.
textByHash.8f252412f30e67f90d2a00800b9eb5f847edf2d9: Unfortunately not. I'm from Aldarin, but she lives in Tal Teklan. It usually takes a special event being hosted for us both to be in the same place.
textByHash.f34f1337e451d270ab342e9fb73819c95e401fa4: It's okay... Sorry... I just miss her.
textByHash.20d72daa3ccfadffe316ec3dec3981af4ddb549e: I suppose she may be where we first met... but this is where we shared our first... you know...
textByHash.6d68484c74d8861d4986173405ed0dc810e959ad: Oh, Xilo! She's gone to where we first met instead! Thank you, iknami. I'll head over there at once!
textByHash.0e81b2d08117373427aa6a95baa1d101e2f41168: To think we were waiting by different trees! It was so silly of us!
